title: Vacancy for Teacher at Manipal University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Manipal University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manipal University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Manipal University:
Manipal University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
